[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [BaseIdTogglePanelButton](./x-components.baseidtogglepanelbutton.md)

## BaseIdTogglePanelButton class

Component containing an event button that emits [XEventsTypes.UserClickedPanelToggleButton](./x-components.xeventstypes.userclickedpaneltogglebutton.md) when clicked with the panelId as payload.

It has a default slot to customize its contents.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseIdTogglePanelButton extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [isPanelOpen](./x-components.baseidtogglepanelbutton.ispanelopen.md) |  | boolean | The panel state to pass through the slot. |
|  [panelId](./x-components.baseidtogglepanelbutton.panelid.md) |  | string | The panelId to use for the toggle event listeners. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [updatePanelState(newState, { id })](./x-components.baseidtogglepanelbutton.updatepanelstate.md) |  | The subscription to the [XEventsTypes.TogglePanelStateChanged](./x-components.xeventstypes.togglepanelstatechanged.md) event to update the <code>isPanelOpen</code> property. |
